---
lang: en-GB
---

# Preface {.unnumbered}

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-badge">UTAD · 2025/2026</div>
  <h1>Medical Informatics</h1>
  <h2>Course Study Guide</h2>
  <p>University of Trás-os-Montes e Alto Douro</p>
</div>
```

This textbook is a self-contained study resource for the **Medical
Informatics** course, covering the main topics in health information
systems, interoperability standards and clinical integration
architectures.

## Organisation {.unnumbered}

The textbook is organised into six thematic blocks:

1. **Foundations and Context** — medical informatics, hospital information
   systems and interoperability
2. **DICOM and PACS** — medical imaging and technical integration
3. **From HL7 to FHIR** — messages and modern APIs
4. **IHE** — integration profiles and operationalisation
5. **Privacy and Governance** — structural requirements and security
6. **Integrated Architecture** — final integrated view

## How to use this textbook {.unnumbered}

Concepts are presented with academic rigour and illustrated with concrete
examples drawn from real systems used in the Portuguese and international
healthcare system. The exercises at the end of each chapter are designed
for independent consolidation of the material.
